message:
fix(pipeline): include tertiary in has_quota check (#7 follow-up)

Fresh-eyes review of the #7 fix: the has_quota check missed tertiary
while human.rs has_any_rate_window correctly includes it. If a
provider ever populated tertiary alone (e.g., Opus/Sonnet tier info
without session or weekly windows), the log would say 'identity only'
while the rendered block showed tertiary. Align the two checks.
